SELECT branch, SUM(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Amount_Due, r'[^0-9.]', '') AS FLOAT64)) AS total_pending_due, SUM(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Amount_Collected, r'[^0-9.]', '') AS FLOAT64)) AS total_collected, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Amount_Collected, r'[^0-9.]', '') AS FLOAT64)), SUM(SAFE_CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Actual_Revenue, r'[^0-9.]', '') AS FLOAT64))) * 100, 2) AS collection_pct FROM `tenms-userdb.english_centre.offline_admissions_gsheet_v3` GROUP BY branch ORDER BY total_pending_due DESC LIMIT 1000;
;

SELECT branch, COUNT(DISTINCT contact) AS registrations, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN attendance_status IN ('present','present_early','present_late') THEN contact END) AS attendance, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN admission_date IS NOT NULL THEN contact END) AS admissions, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN admission_date IS NOT NULL THEN contact END), COUNT(DISTINCT contact)) * 100, 2) AS reg_to_admission_pct, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN admission_date IS NOT NULL THEN contact END), COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN attendance_status IN ('present','present_early','present_late') THEN contact END)) * 100, 2) AS ata_pct FROM `tenms-userdb.Marketing_Leads.offline_leads_api` WHERE submission_date >= DATE '2026-01-01' AND submission_date < DATE '2027-01-01' GROUP BY branch ORDER BY ata_pct DESC, reg_to_admission_pct DESC LIMIT 1000;
;

SELECT Email_Address, COUNT(DISTINCT Mobile_Number) AS admissions FROM `tenms-userdb.english_centre.offline_admissions_gsheet_v3` WHERE Email_Address = 'shatabdi@10minuteschool.com' AND admission_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE(), MONTH) AND CURRENT_DATE() GROUP BY Email_Address LIMIT 1000;
;

SELECT admission_date, COUNT(DISTINCT Mobile_Number) AS admissions FROM `tenms-userdb.english_centre.offline_admissions_gsheet_v3` WHERE Email_Address = 'lamim@10minuteschool.com' AND admission_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC(CURRENT_DATE(), MONTH) AND CURRENT_DATE() GROUP BY admission_date ORDER BY admission_date DESC LIMIT 1000;
;

SELECT data_source, COUNT(DISTINCT contact) AS registrations, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN attendance_status IN ('present','present_early','present_late') THEN contact END) AS attendance, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN attendance_status IN ('present','present_early','present_late') THEN contact END), COUNT(DISTINCT contact)) * 100, 2) AS rta_pct FROM `tenms-userdb.Marketing_Leads.offline_leads_api` GROUP BY data_source ORDER BY rta_pct ASC, registrations DESC LIMIT 1000;
;

SELECT Email_Address, COUNT(DISTINCT Mobile_Number) AS admissions FROM `tenms-userdb.english_centre.offline_admissions_gsheet_v3` GROUP BY Email_Address ORDER BY admissions DESC LIMIT 5;
;
